cards.definition: A ______ is a building where people live.
examples: Her house has a garden and a garage.

cards.definition: ______ is the clear liquid that you drink and use for washing.
examples: The water in this lake is very cold.
Can I have a glass of water, please?
She has a big family with six children.

cards.definition: To ______ means to put food in your mouth and swallow it.
examples: We eat dinner together at seven o'clock.

cards.definition: A ______ is a period of 24 hours.
examples: Monday is the first day of the working week.

cards.definition: If you are ______, you feel pleased and satisfied.
cards.definitionExample: She was very happy to see her friend.
examples: I am happy when the sun is shining.

cards.definition: To ______ means to move or travel somewhere.
examples: We go to the park on weekends.
She wants to go to the cinema tonight.
